title: New CRM Dialer Integration for Sales Teams

posts.author: kingastersk (kingastersk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
We recently worked on a CRM dialer integration setup that connects calling workflows with CRM lead management. The goal was to make outbound and inbound calling easier while keeping all call activity linked to CRM records.

Curious to know how others here are handling CRM + dialer integrations for their sales teams. Are you using native integrations or custom setups?
